title: Sissu Falls
tagline: Sissu Falls — heritage city of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Sissu Falls is located on is on a diversion on the Leh–Manali Highway in Lahaul and Spiti district, Himachal Pradesh.
overview.description: Sissu Falls is located on is on a diversion on the Leh–Manali Highway in Lahaul and Spiti district, Himachal Pradesh. The source of water is the suspended glaciers on the Himalayan range.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Sissu
topPlaces.description: Sissu (also known as Khwaling) is a small town in the Lahaul valley of Himachal Pradesh in India. It is around 40 km from Manali and located on the right bank of Chandra river.

topPlaces.name: Chachi Mug
topPlaces.description: Chachi Mug is a mountain in India.

topPlaces.name: Shikar Beh
topPlaces.description: Shikar Beh is a mountain located in Himachal Pradesh, India. It is an ultra-prominent peak and is the 142nd highest in Asia.

topPlaces.name: Atal Tunnel
topPlaces.description: Atal Tunnel (Hindi: अटल सुरंग) is a 9.02-kilometre-long (5.60 mi) road tunnel connecting Manali and Keylong, thus helping in bypassing the Rohtang Pass, Himachal Pradesh in the eastern Pir Panjal range of the Himalayas. It carries two lanes of National Highway 3 and is the longest highway single-tube tunnel above 10,000 feet (3,048 m) in the world.

topPlaces.name: Mount Friendship
topPlaces.description: Mount Friendship, also called Friendship Peak, is a mountain summit in Manali town of Kullu district of Himachal Pradesh, India on an altitude of 5,287 metres (17,346 ft) above sea level.

items.note: Sissu (also known as Khwaling) is a small town in the Lahaul valley of Himachal Pradesh in India. It is around 40 km from Manali and located on the right bank of Chandra river.
Chachi Mug is a mountain in India.
Shikar Beh is a mountain located in Himachal Pradesh, India. It is an ultra-prominent peak and is the 142nd highest in Asia.

Atal Tunnel (Hindi: अटल सुरंग) is a 9.02-kilometre-long (5.60 mi) road tunnel connecting Manali and Keylong, thus helping in bypassing the Rohtang Pass, Himachal Pradesh in the eastern Pir Panjal range of the Himalayas. It carries two lanes of National Highway 3 and is the longest highway single-tube tunnel above 10,000 feet (3,048 m) in the world.
Mount Friendship, also called Friendship Peak, is a mountain summit in Manali town of Kullu district of Himachal Pradesh, India on an altitude of 5,287 metres (17,346 ft) above sea level.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sissu Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sissu Falls is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sissu Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kullu-Manali Airport (Bhuntar) (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (201 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sissu Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sissu Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sissu Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Sissu Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sissu Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sissu, Chachi Mug, Shikar Beh, Atal Tunnel, Mount Friendship.
